name: claude-code-aso-skill
description: App Store Optimization (ASO) agent skill system for Claude Code and Claude Desktop. Provides multi-agent ASO workflows with 4 specialized sub-agents, iTunes Search API integration, and slash commands for full ASO audits, metadata optimization, pre-launch validation, and competitor analysis.

findings_summary.notes: Legitimate ASO automation skill with a proper SKILL.md, Python utility scripts (keyword_analyzer.py, competitor_analyzer.py, metadata_optimizer.py, aso_scorer.py, etc.), and well-structured documentation. Uses iTunes Search API (free, official) and WebFetch for competitor data. No hooks or dangerous scripts found. License is listed as 'Other' — the LICENSE.md file exists but is non-standard. Description in the existing record mentions 'AEO Automation Framework for GitHub' which is inaccurate; the tool is actually ASO (App Store Optimization) focused on iOS/Android. Scripts appear to be data processing utilities, no network exfiltration patterns. Minor concern: license clarity. Active repo (Nov 2025 creation, updated Feb 2026).
